name: Piano Sequencer Web App
description: A browser-based piano sequencer inspired by digital audio workstations (DAWs). Users can compose music directly in the browser using an interactive piano and timeline-based MIDI editor.

name: AI Image Generation Interface
description: An interface for generating AI images from text prompts with a focus on responsive UI and smooth user interaction. It is implemented in both Java and React

name: Blog Platform
description: A full-stack blog platform designed to support dynamic content, user interaction, and automated background tasks.
